subcodes.title: Words to an American, spoken on 1912-03-27
subcodes.first_line: This Cause acknowledges the truth of all the Books and all the Manifestations of God. The heavenly teachings are composed of two kinds of commandments.... It [reincarnation] is not as people have understood. What is intended is the return of pre-existent attributes and perfections in new forms.
subcodes.first_line_orig: این امر مصدق جمیع کتب و مظاهر الهیه است و تعالیم آسمانی دارای دو قسم از احکامست
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @changing and unchanging parts of religion, @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @reincarnation
